hypothesis: A reflow-first landing layout with a single primary hero CTA, main-column synthesis blocks, compact month-tile archive heat-map, and a promo-only sidebar increases clicks on today's brief and weekly/monthly rollups without reducing subscribe or cross-edition engagement.
change_summary: Refactor homepage (index) under SITE_LANDING_LAYOUT_V2=1: primary "Read today's brief" CTA, secondary hero actions, main column (How it works / About, month-grid Daily Archive, Weekly, Monthly), promo-only sidebar, and WCAG AA footer contrast.
verdict: Shipped to production 2026-07-20 without completing the formal experiment window — operator decision to prioritize engagement over sparse baseline/treatment metrics. SITE_LANDING_LAYOUT_V2=1 enabled in Pages build. Reversible via workflow env or repo variable.
notes: Archived from active experiment queue 2026-07-20. Record kept for Lab history; not listed on /lab/experiments.html. Linked capture: EPH-20260701-LAND.
